samples:
I carry with me a photograph
A reminder of your beauty, the way you talk to me
The morning light streaming through my window
Reminds me why I need someone like you

Never did I ever ask the question
Why is it that I feel so down inside?
And if there's nothing left to hold onto then let it be
Nothing seems worth holding on to anymore
Never did I ever ask the question
Why is it that I feel so down inside?
And if there's nothing left to hold onto then let it be
Nothing seems worth holding on to anymore

The night falls and no one knows
That once again she cried for help in tears of woe
You come into her life as a savior from her plight
But what you don't know is that all along you were her knight

Never did I ever ask the question
Why is it that I feel so down inside?
And if there's nothing left to hold onto then let it be
Nothing seems worth holding on to anymore

Lost again in a sea of stars
I lost all I had to know
Caught the wind that blew so hard
And left me here inside this old abode



Aching for what's gone away
Waiting for what has been forgot
Trying not to think about the pain
But it always seems to haunt me most




Asleep now, but never at peace
Like the morning sun shining through my windows
You're mine now and you'll see me through


We walked along roads that we promised ourselves
That no one would ever hear us say:
"I love you..."


No response from anyone as they read our lips
But their eyes are fixed upon the night
The cold moon is smiling down on them

She spoke nothing
Only turned around
And whispered her thoughts into thin air




Sought out friends to talk about everything
Tried to find out why she had cried
Drowned inside the depths of shame and confusion
When someone saw her cry


After all what did it matter
If the scars run deeper when the light falls low?
Nothing could undo what was done
So I walked outside, came back inside only to leave again

Icy roads beneath my feet
Still the same as they've always been
A thousand years from now, I'll meet my death
In the wake of what has become a dream


The devil speaks to me through your eyes
And whispers that it was all worth while
You saw and you believed
You held my hand and made me see
That I am not alone


So why do you cry for me?
When we both know this is wrong
And why do you say my name?
When we both know what you have done


But there comes a time when love dies in us
There comes a time when love dies in us
There comes a time when love dies in us
There comes a time when love dies in us


Fading dreams left behind
Like the morning sun
Searching my heart inside
For something new




Lyrics by Michael Leonello (lyrics)
Music by Aaron Nario (music)


Ice-cold face before you are greeted with nothing but scorn
You are the only one who has ever seen me cry
Lost sight of reason, groping around on the cold wet ground
Trying hard to believe every word you have said



No way out, no second chance at finding what is lost
It had gone too far and you turned away

In a forest I go
Where the blackbirds sing me no-no
Past a clearing I see
A trail of footsteps leading to me



I have been waiting for so long
For this moment comes at last


Pale skin, sunken eyes
Haunted face, blank surprise
Hiding away from the sun
Once seen is gone
Lost control and took my gun



The hounds are coming now
They can't see through the fog
And they hear me run
From the woods into the open ground
There's nothing left for you here anymore




Come with us in our circle of friends
It's never too late for the end
Your life has been marked by sorrow alone
We will ease your pain, and take you under the neon moon




She was there when we departed
As she had always said that night
No one would ever know what happened
If her spirit should depart





Come with us in our circle of friends
It's never too late for the end
Your life has been marked by sorrow alone
We will ease your pain, and take you under the neon moon

Once I fall asleep
I can't breathe in the air
I close my eyes
And this is nowhere

The moon hangs so high
I hear her call to me
A voice inside of me calls out for you

You were always there when I needed someone
But now that I need nothing, you are nowhere to be seen
There was a time when all I had ever wanted
Was just one second with your eyes


When we went down to the riverbed
She spoke and said
"There it was meant to be"
This was "you and me"

I turned away from everything and lost what I had
Like the morning sun shining on the earth below us
As they left me here alone again
In an empty shell, frozen in time

When we went down to the riverbed
She spoke and said
There it was meant to be
This was 'you and me"
Ah - Ah - Ah - Ah
Ah - Ah - Ah - Ah

The waiting game
When will you return
You left me here in vain
A barren heart is all that remains


There's a road ahead that leads to nowhere
It was long and winding, the trees were singing
And as I travel on my way back home
I am carrying sorrow and pain in my arms



The waiting game
When will you return
You left me here in vain
A barren heart is all that remains


There's a road ahead that leads to nowhere
It was long and winding, the trees were singing
And as I travel on my way back home
I am carrying sorrow and pain in my arms




In the rain of February
When darkness falls over our land
I search for your presence
But find only what I planed

This time when I need you most
My soul is bleeding
I don’t want you to see me cry
If we should meet again...


Please take me under
Into the river of life
To cleanse this burden from my soul

I have been waiting for so long
Waiting to see you again
When the darkness falls and night is gone
You know I'll be here to win

My heart is in my eyes
And it beats only for you


I turned away and said goodbye
Because I had nothing left to share
I gave up all that I hold dear
In search of something new that's waiting there

The morning came, the sun rose high
And showed me what I had become
A memory now of a time gone by
That simple wish was like a summer's sun


My heart is in my eyes
And it beats only for you
My heart is in my eyes
And it beats only for you
It beats only for you!


We are apart forever now
This is our final farewell
Love subsides into thin air
Like an echo from a dream


My heart is in my eyes
And it beats only for you
My heart is in my eyes
And it beats only for you
It beats only for you

Once I had the strength to leave
I did so and left you be
The days rolled on, the sun did shine
And the night came down again


And then I turned away from what's been true
To a life of lies and deceit


Now it is just another day in vain
Another year has gone by without my name


If I could see your face one more time
It would give me all that I desire
So take me through the gate of sleep
Inside we'll meet once more


And when our eyes do meet with great surprise
A wish was granted us and made things clear
You have never loved anyone as much as you love me
Even if we both know that this can never be


If I could see your face one more time
It would give me all that I desire
So take me through the gate of sleep
Inside we'll meet once more


When there are people who will speak for you
Tell them everything and make up excuses
Just say nothing at all
Leave behind this futile search
For proof of your innocence

The years are gone
And so is my innocence
I've been inside this ghost, I was alone
Waiting for the sun to rise again



Once the moon rose higher and the morning came
There it was when you looked through your window pane
As I passed by you spoke my name




Ah, ah, ah


The night is still young
The devil made his choice
A cold light in your eyes
Shows that it was not me who should die

Out of nowhere there comes a sound
A child goes crying into the night
We turn away as it all unfolds
She left her body behind



Ah, ah, ah

My love
Never leave me be...



But now she's here
So lost within the crowd
Her words echoing through empty streets
Lost control, turned around
And called out to save her from what may come

I feel nothing but confusion
I don't know how or why
I can't seem to remember anything at all
I walk along the streets until I reach home

This is my secret, can you see
I told no one, will you believe
There are times when I feel like a ghost
And would go just to leave all of this lost



The days go by and the sun goes down
Drained from within, this empty crown
As I wander through fields of despair
Awaiting for winter - summer is here




Summer is here


There is a reason why they call me ghost
You should not trust everything that was lost
So take what you need, if it's worth your time
But once we depart there'll be nothing behind us



Gasping for air in a forest of fog
Your eyes in search of a soul in the fog
We have seen our way past the forest of fog
Gasping for air in a forest of fog...


In the depths of Winter lies a promise
That Spring comes but seldom does reappear
Why don't you look inside? You know you cannot
Just lose yourself again inside



The sound came closer with every step taken
It seemed so familiar and yet so derisively false
An eternity passes inside a second or less
They had looked into my soul and it seems I confess
